Class Benevolent

java.lang.Object
java.util.Observable
com.risk.strategy.PlayerBehaviour
com.risk.strategy.Benevolent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Benevolent extends PlayerBehaviour
Benevolent class contains methods for the Player Behavior Strategies of computer player.

A benevolent computer player strategy that focuses on protecting its weak countries (reinforces its weakest countries, never attacks, then fortifies in order to move armies to weaker countries).

Author:
Karandeep Singh, Farhan Shaheen
See Also:

    • reinforcementPhase

      public void reinforcementPhase(javafx.collections.ObservableList<Country> countryList, Country country, Player currentPlayer)
      Method for Benevolent class for reinforcement phase. Start and end of the reinforcement phase.
      Specified by:
      reinforcementPhase in class PlayerBehaviour
      Parameters:
      countryList - List of countries owned by the player.
      country - Country to which reinforcement armies are to be assigned.
      currentPlayer - Current player.

      Specified by:

      Parameters:
      attackingCountryList - List of countries attacking.
      defendingCountryList - List of countries defending.
      gamePhase - Current player.

    • fortificationPhase

      public boolean fortificationPhase(javafx.scene.control.ListView<Country> selectedCountryList, javafx.scene.control.ListView<Country> adjCountry, Player currentPlayer)
      Method for Benevolent class for fortification phase. Start and end of the fortification phase.
      Specified by:
      fortificationPhase in class PlayerBehaviour
      Parameters:
      selectedCountryList - List of countries selected by the player.
      adjCountry - List of adjacent countries.
      currentPlayer - Current player.
      Returns:
      true If the fortification successful; other wise false.
